title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-hosted LLM runner with a simple CLI and REST API to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API—works in Node, Bun, Deno and browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull models with a few lines of code.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration to use Ollama models as LLM or chat endpoints in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Lightweight RAG chatbot template that pairs Ollama with Sentence-Transformers and Chroma for private Q&A.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI wrapper around ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting and keybindings.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat with Ollama models inside the editor, generate code or docs on demand.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) and compose examples for running Ollama in Docker.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama with reactive streams, Spring Boot starter and Micronaut integration.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community-maintained Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library for Ollama with chat, generate, embed and model management endpoints.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client for Ollama with streaming chat and generate methods.

title: ollama-models
summary: Registry of Modelfile recipes maintained by Ollama for Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, CodeLlama, etc.

title: ollama-gpt4all-bridge
summary: GPT4All backend that re-uses Ollama’s dynamic GGML/GGUF loader for broader model support.

title: ollama-reddit
summary: Active subreddit for Ollama news, model sharing, troubleshooting and feature requests.

title: ollama-hackernews-discussion
summary: Hacker News thread discussing Ollama’s move to Apache 2.0 and new embedding endpoints.
